qa.note: dev-qa passed with 107/107 tests, lint ok, and stress ok before M108 release packet

production_status.note: release artifact manifest and retention note were pending before retaining this packet set

known_limitations: CodeQL is an automated code scanning signal, not an external audit
CodeQL does not replace Atlas' retained trust-packet verification
Shell-heavy Atlas runtime behavior still depends on local QA, shell linting, Bats coverage, review, and retained packet verification
the CodeQL workflow is scoped to the public atlas-trust-infrastructure repository so private mirrors can skip it cleanly
Atlas production status is a local contract, not deployment certification
